system_prompt: You are an expert Java Spring Boot engineer. You will implement the ADMIN WORKFLOW for an online pharmacy application. Follow every instruction precisely. Generate complete, compilable, production-quality code. Apply SOLID principles and the four design patterns listed below. Do not generate placeholder stubs — write full implementations. After each file, print a one-line summary: [DONE] <ClassName>.

context.note: Add column active (TINYINT default 1) to pharmacies via Flyway migration V3.

design_patterns.implementation: AdminDashboardService is a Spring @Service — the IoC container enforces single instance. Document this explicitly in a Javadoc comment on the class.

After every pharmacy status toggle, publish an AdminActionEvent (extends ApplicationEvent) via ApplicationEventPublisher. An AuditLogListener annotated @EventListener @Async persists an AuditLog entity to the audit_logs table.

Create a NotificationFactory with a static createNotification(String type, String recipient, String message) method that returns an EmailNotification or SmsNotification based on type. Call it from AdminPharmacyService after a status toggle.
Create a LoggingAdminPharmacyService that implements the same AdminPharmacyServiceI interface as AdminPharmacyService, wraps it, and logs method entry/exit with SLF4J. Register it as a @Primary bean.

tasks.title: Flyway migration V3 — Admin schema
instructions: Add column: ALTER TABLE pharmacies ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS active TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1
Create table admin_users: id BIGINT PK AUTO_INCREMENT, user_id BIGINT NOT NULL UNIQUE FK->users(id), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

Create table audit_logs: id BIGINT PK AUTO_INCREMENT, admin_id BIGINT NOT NULL FK->users(id), action VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, target_type VARCHAR(60), target_id BIGINT, detail TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

tasks.title: JPA Entities
instructions: AdminUser: @Entity @Table(name='admin_users'), id, @OneToOne user (User), createdAt
AuditLog: @Entity @Table(name='audit_logs'), id, adminId (Long), action (String), targetType (String), targetId (Long), detail (String), createdAt (LocalDateTime @CreationTimestamp)

tasks.title: Spring Data Repositories
instructions: AdminUserRepository extends JpaRepository<AdminUser, Long>
AuditLogRepository extends JpaRepository<AuditLog, Long> with method: Page<AuditLog> findAllByOrderByCreatedAtDesc(Pageable pageable)

tasks.title: DTOs
instructions: UserSummaryDTO: Long id, String email, String role, LocalDateTime createdAt — use Java record
PharmacySummaryDTO: Long id, String name, String address, boolean active, Double latitude, Double longitude — use Java record
DashboardStatsDTO: long totalUsers, long totalPharmacies, long activePharmacies, long totalPrescriptions, long prescriptionsToday, double treatmentRatePercent — use Java record
PharmacyStatusUpdateDTO: Boolean active with @NotNull(message='active field is required')

tasks.title: Observer: AdminActionEvent + AuditLogListener
instructions: AdminActionEvent extends ApplicationEvent: fields Long adminId, String action, String targetType, Long targetId, String detail. Constructor sets all fields and calls super(source).
AuditLogListener: @Component, method @EventListener(AdminActionEvent.class) @Async void handle(AdminActionEvent event) — build AuditLog from event fields and save via AuditLogRepository.
Add @EnableAsync to the main @SpringBootApplication class.

tasks.title: Factory Method: NotificationFactory
instructions: Notification interface: void send()
EmailNotification implements Notification: stores recipient and message, send() logs 'Sending EMAIL to {recipient}: {message}'
SmsNotification implements Notification: same but logs SMS
NotificationFactory: static Notification createNotification(String type, String recipient, String message) — returns EmailNotification if type.equalsIgnoreCase('EMAIL'), else SmsNotification

tasks.title: Service layer (interface + impl + decorator)
instructions: AdminUserService: Page<UserSummaryDTO> getAllUsers(Pageable p) using UserRepository; UserSummaryDTO getUserById(Long id) throws EntityNotFoundException if absent. Map manually (no MapStruct needed).

AdminPharmacyServiceI interface: Page<PharmacySummaryDTO> getAllPharmacies(Pageable p); PharmacySummaryDTO getPharmacyById(Long id); PharmacySummaryDTO updateStatus(Long id, boolean active, Long adminId).

AdminPharmacyService implements AdminPharmacyServiceI: inject PharmacyRepository (shared), ApplicationEventPublisher, NotificationFactory. In updateStatus: fetch pharmacy, set active, save, publish AdminActionEvent, call NotificationFactory.createNotification('EMAIL', ...).send().
LoggingAdminPharmacyService: @Primary @Service decorator wrapping AdminPharmacyService (injected by constructor). Override each method to log entry/exit with SLF4J then delegate.

AdminDashboardService: @Service (Singleton). inject UserRepository, PharmacyRepository, PrescriptionRepository, OrderRepository. Implement getStats() computing all DashboardStatsDTO fields. Add Javadoc: '/* Singleton — single instance managed by Spring IoC container */'.

tasks.title: Global Exception Handler
instructions: @RestControllerAdvice class
Handle EntityNotFoundException -> 404 with JSON body {timestamp, status:404, error:'Not Found', message, path}
Handle MethodArgumentNotValidException -> 400 listing field errors
Handle AccessDeniedException -> 403
Handle generic Exception -> 500

tasks.title: Security configuration
instructions: @Configuration @EnableWebSecurity @EnableMethodSecurity
SecurityFilterChain bean: permit /api/v1/auth/**, /swagger-ui/**, /v3/api-docs/**; require ROLE_ADMIN for /api/v1/admin/**; all other requests authenticated.
Add JwtAuthenticationFilter (assume it already exists in shared security package) to the filter chain before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.
PasswordEncoder bean: BCryptPasswordEncoder(strength=12).

tasks.title: REST Controllers
instructions: All controllers: @RestController @RequestMapping('/api/v1/admin') @PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN')") @Tag(name='Admin', description='Administrator operations')
AdminUserController: GET /users (Pageable, @PageableDefault(size=10)) -> 200 Page<UserSummaryDTO>; GET /users/{id} -> 200 UserSummaryDTO or 404.

AdminPharmacyController: GET /pharmacies (Pageable) -> 200; GET /pharmacies/{id} -> 200 or 404; PATCH /pharmacies/{id}/status (@RequestBody @Valid PharmacyStatusUpdateDTO, @AuthenticationPrincipal to extract adminId) -> 200 PharmacySummaryDTO.
AdminDashboardController: GET /dashboard -> 200 DashboardStatsDTO.
Each endpoint must have @Operation(summary='...') and @ApiResponse annotations for 200 and error cases.

tasks.title: Unit Tests (JUnit 5 + Mockito)
instructions: AdminUserServiceTest: mock UserRepository; test getAllUsers returns mapped DTOs; test getUserById throws EntityNotFoundException for unknown id.
AdminPharmacyServiceTest (TDD — write tests first): test updateStatus sets active correctly; test updateStatus publishes AdminActionEvent; test updateStatus throws 404 for unknown id.
AdminDashboardServiceTest: mock all 4 repositories; test getStats returns correct DashboardStatsDTO with expected values.
AuditLogListenerTest: create AdminActionEvent, call handle(), verify auditLogRepository.save() called once with correct fields.

AdminPharmacyControllerTest: use @WebMvcTest; test PATCH /pharmacies/1/status returns 200 with valid body; test same endpoint returns 400 with missing active field; test returns 403 without ADMIN role.
Target: JaCoCo >= 80% instruction coverage on com.pharmacy.admin package.

tasks.title: Integration Tests
instructions: @SpringBootTest(webEnvironment=RANDOM_PORT) @AutoConfigureMockMvc @ActiveProfiles('test')
application-test.yml: spring.datasource.url=jdbc:h2:mem:testdb, spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=create-drop
Seed one AdminUser and one Pharmacy in @BeforeEach via repositories (no SQL scripts).
Test: GET /api/v1/admin/users with valid admin JWT returns 200 and non-empty content array.
Test: PATCH /api/v1/admin/pharmacies/{id}/status with {active:false} returns 200 and active=false in body.
Test: GET /api/v1/admin/dashboard returns 200 with treatmentRatePercent field.
Test: any admin endpoint without JWT returns 403.
Helper method generateAdminJwt() creates a test JWT signed with the same secret key from application-test.yml.

tasks.title: Postman Collection
instructions: Collection name: Admin Workflow — INF4121

Pre-request script at collection level: POST {{baseUrl}}/api/v1/auth/login with body {email: {{adminEmail}}, password: {{adminPassword}}}; store response token in pm.collectionVariables.set('token', ...)
Variables: baseUrl=http://localhost:8080, adminEmail=admin@pharmacy.ma, adminPassword=Admin@1234
Requests:
1. GET {{baseUrl}}/api/v1/admin/users — header Authorization: Bearer {{token}} — test: status 200, body.content is array
2. GET {{baseUrl}}/api/v1/admin/users/1 — test: status 200, body.id exists
3. GET {{baseUrl}}/api/v1/admin/pharmacies — test: status 200
4. PATCH {{baseUrl}}/api/v1/admin/pharmacies/1/status body {active:false} — test: status 200, body.active === false
5. PATCH {{baseUrl}}/api/v1/admin/pharmacies/1/status body {active:true} — test: status 200, body.active === true
6. GET {{baseUrl}}/api/v1/admin/dashboard — test: status 200, body.treatmentRatePercent is number
7. GET {{baseUrl}}/api/v1/admin/users no auth header — test: status 403
Run command: newman run Admin_Workflow.postman_collection.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export newman-report.json

output_format: For each task, output: (1) the full file path, (2) the complete file content, (3) a [DONE] summary line. Do not skip any task. Do not use TODO comments in production code.
